name: ⏸ Lane: Human Review Gate
description: NEEDS-HUMAN-REVIEW DEMONSTRATION — The supervisor checkpoint uses mode='needs-human-review'. With --interactive flag: execution PAUSES and waits for an operator to approve/reject via CLI prompt. Without --interactive: auto-proceeds (non-interactive CI mode).

checks.prompt: Produce a decision summary for human review: (1) list the 3 most important architectural decisions made in this DAG run, (2) flag 2 decisions that have non-obvious trade-offs, (3) list 2 items that a human architect should validate before proceeding. This will be presented to the operator at the human-review gate.
checks.pass: ⏸ [human-gate] Review package prepared — awaiting operator decision
